docs.title: Test Composite Actions
docs.text: This repository contains reusable GitHub Actions components for CI/CD pipelines.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
This project demonstrates how to create and use:

  • Composite Actions - Reusable action steps that can be shared across workflows
  • Reusable Workflows - Complete workflow templates that can be called from other workflows

docs.title: Repository Structure
docs.text:
.github/
├── actions/
│   └── deploy/              # Composite action for deployments
│       └── action.yml
└── workflows/
    ├── ci.yml               # Main CI workflow
    ├── ci-template.yml      # Reusable workflow template
    └── deploy-docs.yml      # Documentation deployment

docs.title: Using the Deploy Action
docs.text:
- name: Deploy
  uses: ./.github/actions/deploy
  with:
    environment: dev

docs.title: Calling the CI Template Workflow
docs.text:
jobs:
  ci:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/ci-template.yml

docs.title: Components
docs.text: Component Type Description Deploy Composite Action Deploys to target environment CI Workflow Full CI pipeline with build, test, lint, deploy CI Template Reusable Workflow Lint job that can be called by other workflows

docs.title: Deploy
docs.text: This composite action performs a deployment to the specified environment and returns deployment information.

docs.title: Inputs
docs.text: Input Description Required Default environment Target environment (dev, staging, prod) Yes dev

docs.title: Outputs
docs.text: Output Description deploy-url The deployment URL status Deployment status timestamp Deployment timestamp (ISO 8601 format)

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
- name: Deploy to environment
  id: deploy
  uses: ./.github/actions/deploy
  with:
    environment: dev

- name: Show deployment info
  run: |
    echo "Deployed to: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy-url }}"
    echo "Status: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.status }}"
    echo "Timestamp: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.timestamp }}"

docs.title: Deploy to production
docs.text:
- name: Deploy to production
  uses: ./.github/actions/deploy
  with:
    environment: prod

Source of .github/actions/deploy/action.yml@main

docs.title: CI Template
docs.text: This is a reusable workflow that runs linting. It can be called from other workflows using workflow_call.

docs.title: Trigger
docs.text: This workflow uses workflow_call, which means it can only be triggered by another workflow.

docs.title: Jobs
docs.text: Job Description lint Runs linting checks on the codebase

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
Call this workflow from another workflow:

jobs:
  ci:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/ci-template.yml

docs.title: Usage from external repository
docs.text:
jobs:
  lint:
    uses: esmailbenmoussa/test-composite-actions/.github/workflows/ci-template.yml@main

docs.title: Workflow definition
docs.text:
name: CI Template

on:
  workflow_call:

jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: echo "Running linter..."
      - run: echo "Lint passed"

Source of .github/workflows/ci-template.yml@main

docs.title: CI
docs.text: This workflow runs the full CI/CD pipeline including build, test, lint, and deploy stages.

docs.title: Triggers
docs.text: Trigger Description push Runs on push to main branch workflow_dispatch Manual trigger with environment selection

docs.title: Manual Trigger Inputs
docs.text: Input Description Options Default environment Target environment dev, staging, prod dev

docs.title: Jobs
docs.text:
The workflow consists of 4 sequential jobs:

build → test → ci (lint) → cd (deploy)
Job Description Dependencies build Builds the project None test Runs tests build ci Runs linting via reusable workflow test cd Deploys using composite action ci

docs.title: Automatic (on push)
docs.text:
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

docs.title: Manual dispatch
docs.text: Trigger manually from the GitHub Actions UI with environment selection.

docs.title: Workflow structure
docs.text:
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: echo "Building..."

  test:
    needs: build
    # ...

  ci:
    needs: test
    uses: ./.github/workflows/ci-template.yml

  cd:
    needs: ci
    steps:
      - uses: ./.github/actions/deploy
        with:
          environment: ${{ inputs.environment || 'dev' }}

Source of .github/workflows/ci.yml@main
